docs.title: Documentation
docs.selectPage: Select a page from the sidebar to get started
docs.contentInstall:
## Installation

1. Open the [Chrome Web Store](https://chromewebstore.google.com)
2. Search for **CallSheet**
3. Click **Add to Chrome**
4. Pin the extension to your toolbar

The extension icon will appear in your browser toolbar. Click it to open the sidebar.
docs.contentSetup:
## Initial Setup

### Create an account

1. Click the CallSheet extension icon
2. Click **Create account** or **Sign in**
3. Enter your email and password

### Open a Google Sheet

Navigate to any Google Spreadsheet that contains phone numbers. CallSheet will automatically detect phone numbers on the page.

### First call

Hover over any detected phone number to see the call button. Click **Call** to initiate your first call.
docs.contentConnectVoximplant:
## Connect Voximplant

CallSheet uses Voximplant for WebRTC browser calls.

### Get your credentials

1. Sign up at [manage.voximplant.com](https://manage.voximplant.com)
2. Create an application
3. Create a user (login + password)
4. Note your **Account ID** and **API key**

### Enter credentials in CallSheet

1. Open the extension → **Settings** → **Voximplant**
2. Enter your login, password, and Application ID
3. Click **Connect**

A green indicator means you are connected and ready to call.
docs.contentMakeCalls:
## Making Calls

### Browser call (WebRTC)

Requires Voximplant connected. Click **Call** next to any detected number. Your microphone will be used for audio.

### Phone callback

Use this if you prefer your mobile phone:
1. Enter your mobile number in Settings → Call Mode
2. Select **Phone** mode
3. Click **Call** — we will call your phone first, then connect to the client

### During a call

- Add notes in the **Note** field
- See call duration in real time
- Click **End call** to finish

After the call, results are automatically saved to the spreadsheet.
docs.contentColumnMapping:
## Column Mapping

CallSheet can write call results back to your spreadsheet. Configure which columns to use:

1. Open **Settings** → **Column Mapping**
2. Map fields to your spreadsheet columns:
   - **Status** — call result (answered, missed, etc.)
   - **Duration** — call duration in seconds
   - **Note** — your notes from the call
   - **Date** — when the call was made
3. Click **Save**

Columns are identified by letter (A, B, C...) or header name.
docs.contentCallHistory:
## Call History

View all your past calls:

- **Extension** → **History** tab — full call log
- **Mobile app** → **Statistics** tab — monthly overview

### Filters

- By date range
- By status (answered, missed, failed)
- By contact name or phone

### Export

All results are already in your Google Sheet. Use Google Sheets export features to download as CSV or Excel.
docs.contentPlans:
## Plans & Pricing

### FREE
- **30 calls per month**
- Browser calls (WebRTC)
- Phone callback mode
- Call history (last 30 days)
- Auto-save to spreadsheet

### PRO — .90/month or /year
- **Unlimited calls**
- Everything in FREE
- Call recording
- Priority support
- Extended history (1 year)

For Russian users: PRO is available at **990 ₽/month** or **7 900 ₽/year** via YooKassa.
docs.contentUpgrade:
## Upgrade to PRO

1. Open the extension → **Settings** → **Billing**
   OR open the mobile app → **Profile** → **Billing**
2. Select a plan (monthly or yearly)
3. Choose payment method (Stripe or YooKassa)
4. Complete payment

PRO activates immediately after payment. Your call quota resets to unlimited.
docs.contentFaqGeneral:
## General FAQ

**Q: How does phone number detection work?**
CallSheet scans the visible Google Sheet cells for patterns matching phone numbers. It highlights detected numbers with a call button.

**Q: Does it work on any spreadsheet?**
Yes — any Google Spreadsheet. Detection works on the cells visible in the viewport.

**Q: Is my data secure?**
Yes. CallSheet does not store spreadsheet data. Your Voximplant credentials are encrypted with AES-256 on our server.

**Q: Can I use it without Voximplant?**
Yes — use Phone callback mode. You will need a mobile or landline number to receive the callback.
docs.contentFaqVoximplant:
## Voximplant FAQ

**Q: What is Voximplant?**
Voximplant is a cloud communications platform that powers the WebRTC browser calls in CallSheet.

**Q: Do I need to pay for Voximplant separately?**
Voximplant has its own pricing based on call minutes. CallSheet does not mark up Voximplant costs.

**Q: My connection keeps dropping — what to do?**
1. Check your internet connection
2. Make sure your Voximplant credentials are correct
3. Verify the Application ID matches the app in Voximplant console
4. Try disconnecting and reconnecting in Settings → Voximplant

**Q: Can I use my existing Voximplant account?**
Yes — any Voximplant account works. Create a new user in your Voximplant application and use those credentials.
